name: search-company-knowledge
description: Search across company knowledge bases (Confluence, Jira, internal docs) to find and explain internal concepts, processes, and technical details. When Claude needs to: (1) Find or search for information about systems, terminology, processes, deployment, authentication, infrastructure, architecture, or technical concepts, (2) Search internal documentation, knowledge base, company docs, or our docs, (3) Explain what something is, how it works, or look up information, or (4) Synthesize informatio...
